## JAK Shield is live 🛡️

The MCP-native security gateway between AI agents and the tools they call. Sits between any MCP-compatible client (Claude Desktop, Cursor, VS Code, Cline, Windsurf, Zed, OpenAI Agents SDK) and the real connectors — Gmail, Postgres, GitHub, shell, browser, payments, social.

**This is the v0.1.0 baseline.** v0.2.0 (block override + heightened scrutiny) and v0.3.0 (user-controlled pause + auto-resume) have since shipped on `main` — see the [v0.2.0 release](../../releases/tag/v0.2.0) and the [v0.3.0 release](../../releases/tag/v0.3.0) for the new feature notes.

---

### What's in v0.1.0

**Policy engine** — 8 deterministic rules with RBAC + approval queue, 10-stage decision pipeline, HMAC-signed decisions with key rotation, scoped capability tokens (single-use, args-bound JWTs).

**PII detection v2** — 28 PII types with cryptographic checksum validators (Luhn, Verhoeff, mod-97 IBAN, ABA, mod-11 NHS, CPF, CNPJ, SIN, NRIC, TFN, EIN, SWIFT, Bitcoin, Ethereum). Context-window confidence scoring.

**Injection detection v2** — 6 stages (standard regex, structural HTML/JSON, Unicode confusables, base64/hex/percent decode, spaced-letter de-spacing, multilingual). 80+ patterns across 13 non-English languages plus an English baseline.

**Cross-call taint tracking** — MinHash + n-gram fingerprinting, per-session, blocks UNTRUSTED data flowing into sensitive sinks. **Novel for MCP.**

**Multi-step attack chains** — 20 patterns with data-flow tracking (output of step N → args of step N+1) and time-decay weighting.

**Behavioural anomaly detection** — EWMA + z-score, multi-window (1m / 5m / 1h / 24h), per-tenant + per-agent baselines.

**Regulatory hints** — PCI DSS, HIPAA, GDPR, CCPA, SOX, FERPA, DPDP signals with CFR / GDPR article citations and explicit "not legal advice" disclaimer.

**SaaS foundation** — Multi-tenant data model, password + JWT auth, API keys with scopes, team invitations, AES-256-GCM encrypted credential vault.

**Dashboard** — Next.js 15 with approvals queue, audit search, analytics, team management, API key management, credentials vault, billing pages.

**CI** — GitHub Actions: build + test + bench + perf-check on every push.

**Adversarial benchmark** — 45 labeled scenarios across 25 attack categories, all passing.

**Packaging** — `.mcpb` bundle for one-click Claude Desktop install.

---

### Install

```bash
git clone https://github.com/inbharatai/jak-shield.git
cd jak-shield
pnpm install && pnpm build
node scripts/install-claude-desktop-mcp.mjs
```

Restart Claude Desktop. Ask: *"What jak-shield tools do you have?"* — you'll see 23 shield primitives + connector wrappers.

---

### Verified at release

- `pnpm -r build` — clean (32 packages)
- `pnpm -r test` — 147 tests passing (now 179 on main with v0.2 + v0.3 additions)
- `pnpm bench` — 45/45 adversarial scenarios
- `bench/perf-bench.mjs` — initial measurement showed p95 0.64ms on the release machine; current measurement on the dev machine is p95 ~2.3ms end-to-end through MCP stdio (well under the 50ms SLO)
